mnemonics.title: Big O Order
mnemonics.content: Oh Oh Oh! Outrunning The Worst - O(n), O(n²), O(2^n) - each gets WORSE!

mnemonics.title: Omega Omega!
mnemonics.content: Outstanding Moments Bring Great Happiness - Ω(n) for BEST case: omega-3 fish, omega-gentle, BEST performance!

mnemonics.title: Theta Tight
mnemonics.content: The Three Stooges - Theta says it's TIGHT between ceiling and floor: Θ(n) = just right!

mnemonics.title: Growth Rate Song
mnemonics.content: Log N is Lo-og, N is Neat, N log N is Super Sweet, N² is Not Complete, 2ⁿ is OOPS, Factorial makes us CRY!

mnemonics.title: Compare Complexities
mnemonics.content: Constant(1) < Log(n) < Linear(n) < n·log(n) < Quadratic(n²) < Cubic(n³) < Exponential(2ⁿ) < Factorial(n!)

acronyms.expansion: Big O - Omicron (Greek for 'O' for Order)
acronyms.usage: Worst-case scenario; the UPPER bound. Algorithm won't take longer than this.
Best-case scenario; the LOWER bound. Algorithm won't run faster than this.
Tight bound; both upper and lower. Algorithm performs exactly at this rate.
f(n) = o(g(n)) means f grows strictly slower than g(n)
f(n) = ω(g(n)) means f grows strictly faster than g(n)

acronyms.expansion: Time function of input size n
acronyms.usage: Represents the time an algorithm takes for input size n

visualTips.visualization: Draw a mountain climber going UP - O is the ceiling, the LIMIT you won't exceed. Think: ceiling = can't go higher = worst case.
Draw a foundation/ground - Ω is the floor, the minimum you need. Think: ground = can't go lower = best case.
Draw parallel train tracks - one above, one below, algorithm runs BETWEEN them. Perfect fit!
Graph: y-axis = time, x-axis = n. Constant=flat line, Log=gradual curve, Linear=diagonal 45°, Quadratic=parabola, Exponential=rocket launch!
Draw boxes inside boxes: 1 loop = n, 2 nested loops = n², 3 nested = n³. Count the nesting depth!

analogies.analogy: Traffic jam on your commute: you ARRIVE LATE worst case - that's your upper bound! (You might arrive earlier, but never later than this.)
Green lights all the way! Best-case driving time. Real world is usually slower but you HOPE for this.
Your regular commute with normal traffic: typically takes THIS long. Neither best nor worst - just EXPECTED.
Cooking: O(1) = instant microwave, O(n) = single pot, O(n²) = multi-course banquet requiring nested prep!
Backpack vs suitcase: O(1) = small backpack (fixed), O(n) = suitcase that grows with items, O(n²) = warehouse for every combination!
